stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background.
personalization: She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She opposes increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from your constituency. She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She opposes increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
